Classify this LBA2 game screenshot against the expected checkpoint. Return strict JSON only. The checkpoint_id field must exactly equal the supplied checkpoint_id. Include a non-empty summary that justifies every boolean field.

{
  "checkpoint_id": "capability_behavior_accel_otringal_normal",
  "save": "otringal-open.LBA",
  "visual_source": "live_window_capture",
  "scene_description": "An open outdoor Otringal city area suitable for forward movement testing.",
  "target_description": "Open walking space ahead of Twinsen, without an immediate wall or menu blocking movement.",
  "expected": {
    "twinsen_visible": true,
    "target_visible": true,
    "ui_state": "gameplay",
    "unsafe_pose_signs": false
  },
  "summary_must_mention": [
    "Twinsen",
    "open",
    "gameplay"
  ],
  "response_schema": "game-drive-visual-classification-v1"
}
stdout_tail: {"schema":"game-drive-visual-classification-v1","checkpoint_id":"capability_behavior_accel_otringal_normal","matches":true,"confidence":"high","summary":"Twinsen is visible near the lower center of the live game view, facing into an open outdoor Otringal walking area with clear space ahead. The target area is visible and not blocked by an immediate wall, dialog, or menu. The UI state is gameplay because the scene shows the active 3D game world with no overlay menus. No unsafe pose signs are visible; Twinsen appears upright and normally positioned.","observed":{"twinsen_visible":true,"target_visible":true,"ui_state":"gameplay","unsafe_pose_signs":false},"mismatches":[]}
